problem id: 97e7a57f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  01101001 -> 00101110
  11100001 -> 00111011
  00100011 -> 01100101
  10100101 -> 10110001
  00100010 -> 01000101
  10011000 -> 00010111
  00000110 -> 11000000
  01100010 -> 01001111
  11000101 -> 10111110

query: 10101010
predicted answer: 01010000
